case_title: CCSF/ TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. GRANT AVENUE LAND TRUST

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $150. SERVED JUN-04-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GRANT AVENUE LAND TRUST
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,357.00 FILED BY CCSF/ TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT GRANT AVENUE LAND TRUST ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-25-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY PAUL SARMIENTO. DEFENDANT GRANT AVENUE LAND TRUST IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: C. CHENG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
